name: pr-in-the-loop
description: Issue-first engineering workflow skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create concrete GitHub Issues from live work context.
interface.longDescription: PR In The Loop packages issue-first development workflows for Codex. Its first skill inspects repository and work-tool context, narrows ambiguous engineering work into one concrete problem, drafts an issue using project templates, and publishes it to GitHub.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $pr-in-the-loop:open-issue to turn current work context into a GitHub Issue.
